mainEntity.name: What questions should Chicago firms ask AEO agencies?
mainEntity.text: What questions should Chicago firms ask AEO agencies?

acceptedAnswer.text: Ask: 'Show Chicago law firm case studies? AI audit process? Schema examples? E-E-A-T tactics? ROI guarantees?'[3]

suggestedAnswer.text: Probe for local Chicago wins, tools like SEMrush AI, custom schema, and 90-day benchmarks. Demand transparency on subcontractors. Red flags: no attorney clients or vague metrics. This ensures jurisdiction-specific strategies.[7]

name: Key Questions for Chicago AEO Agencies
description: Ask: 'Show Chicago law firm case studies? AI audit process? Schema examples? E-E-A-T tactics? ROI guarantees?'[3]
